title: Mixin Usage
description: Apply a mixin to add specific behavior to a class without inheritance.
problemStatement:
Mixins are for code reuse across hierarchies. Create a `mixin Logger { void log(String msg) => print('[LOG] $msg'); }`.

Create a class `AuthService` that uses the mixin (`with Logger`) and calls `log('Login success')` in its `login` method.

**Expected Output:** `[LOG] Login success`.
hints: Include the `mixin` keyword and use `with` in the class definition.
